claim: The myocardial cell lineage originally develops from cardiac progenitors of mesodermal origin.

result.claim: The myocardial cell lineage originally develops from cardiac progenitors of mesodermal origin.
result.reasoning: The claim is strongly supported by multiple propositions. Proposition 1363 explicitly states that "Cardiomyocytes... are distinct mesoderm-derived lineages" (Paper ID: 4427392). This is further reinforced by propositions 1364 and 1365, which indicate that cardiovascular lineages, including those that form cardiomyocytes, develop from a common Flk-1+ cardiovascular progenitor, which represents an early stage in mesoderm specification (Paper ID: 4427392). Additionally, proposition 4634 notes that "Precardiogenic mesoderm is initially derived from anterior lateral plate mesoderm" (Paper ID: 46726515), and proposition 1379 mentions that "ltbp3+ cells give rise to three cardiovascular lineages in the outflow tract and myocardium" (Paper ID: 4431639). These pieces of evidence consistently confirm the mesodermal origin of myocardial cell lineages from cardiac progenitors.

evidence.text: The first heart field differentiates earlier in lateral plate mesoderm.
evidence.source: Latent TGF-β binding protein 3 identifies a second heart field in zebrafish

evidence.text: ltbp3+ cells give rise to three cardiovascular lineages in the outflow tract and myocardium in the distal ventricle.
evidence.source: Latent TGF-β binding protein 3 identifies a second heart field in zebrafish

evidence.text: Researchers identified a group of cardiac progenitors that express the TGF-β signalling regulator ltbp3 in zebrafish.
evidence.source: Latent TGF-β binding protein 3 identifies a second heart field in zebrafish

evidence.text: ltbp3+ cells differentiate in pharyngeal mesoderm after formation of the heart tube.
evidence.source: Latent TGF-β binding protein 3 identifies a second heart field in zebrafish

evidence.text: During gestation, mothers acquire CD34+CD38+ cells of fetal origin that persist decades.
evidence.source: Pregnancy Allows the Transfer and Differentiation of Fetal Lymphoid Progenitors into Functional T and B Cells in Mothers

evidence.text: The authors compared their data set of genes enriched in mouse embryonic stem (ES) cell–derived cardiac progenitor cells (CPCs) with freely available TF–binding databases.
evidence.source: Yin-Yang 1, a New Player in Early Heart Development

evidence.text: ltbp3 transcripts mark a field of cardiac progenitor cells with defining characteristics of the anterior SHF in mammals.
evidence.source: Latent TGF-β binding protein 3 identifies a second heart field in zebrafish

evidence.text: The Flk-1+ cardiovascular progenitor represents one of the earliest stages in mesoderm specification to the cardiovascular lineages.
evidence.source: Human cardiovascular progenitor cells develop from a KDR+ embryonic-stem-cell-derived population

evidence.text: Induced pluripotent stem (iPS) cells were generated from fibroblasts.
evidence.source: Directly reprogrammed fibroblasts show global epigenetic remodeling and widespread tissue contribution.

evidence.text: Pyramidal neurons arise from the ventricular zone during corticogenesis.
